steps.title: Convert percentage increase to growth factor
steps.content: A 2.4% annual increase means we keep 100% of the value and add 2.4% more. The growth factor is 100% + 2.4% = 102.4% = 1.024. Each year, the value is multiplied by 1.024.

steps.title: Build the exponential function
steps.content:
For exponential growth, the function is (initial value) × (growth factor)time. Starting with \$174,000 and multiplying by 1.024 each year, after x years the value is:

$$f(x) = 174,000(1.024)^x$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
